section.connectToParticipate: Connect your wallet to view your voting power and participate

votingPower.title: Your Voting Power
votingPower.connectWallet: Connect wallet to view your voting power
votingPower.baseTooltip: Base voting power for connecting your Nasun wallet.
votingPower.leaderboardTooltip: Verify your X account to earn bonus voting power from community engagement on the leaderboard.
votingPower.onChainTooltip: Trade, bet, lend, and use AI on Nasun Devnet to earn more voting power.
votingPower.battalionTooltip: Battalion NFT allowlist registrants receive +20 bonus voting power.
votingPower.frontiersTooltip: Frontiers whitelist registrants receive +20 bonus voting power.
votingPower.xAccountTooltip: Link your X (Twitter) account to receive +10 bonus voting power.
votingPower.howBaseDesc: Every wallet holder starts with 1 voting power.
votingPower.howLeaderboardDesc: Higher rankers on the community leaderboard earn more voting power. Verify your X account and engage with the community.
votingPower.howOnChainDesc: Trade on DeepBook, participate in prediction markets, lottery, lending, and use Baram AI to earn activity-based voting power.
votingPower.howAllowlistDesc: Battalion NFT allowlist registrants receive a significant bonus to their voting power.
votingPower.howXDesc: Link your X (Twitter) account to receive a small participation bonus.
votingPower.currentPhaseDesc: This governance phase uses an off-chain Oracle to calculate and verify voting power. The Oracle signs certificates that are validated on-chain. In future phases, voting power calculation will be fully decentralized.
